steps.text: The clock shows seven in the morning. Look at the display — it says AM. AM means morning.
AM — morning time! Any time before midday is AM. Now press Lunch. Watch what happens to AM!
It changed to PM! Because lunchtime is after midday, the clock flipped from AM to PM. PM means afternoon and evening.
PM — afternoon time. PM goes from midday all the way until midnight. Press Bedtime — is it still PM?
Still PM! Bedtime is in the evening — that is still PM. PM lasts a long time. Now press Wake up. What will happen?
steps.feedback: AM is back! Because wake-up time is in the morning, it flipped back to AM. Morning is always AM.
